feature_name: Hub beta brain dump and sidekick refresh
scope_summary: Refreshes the website-attached hub beta build with the rebuilt brain dump capture flow, sharper sidekick voice layers, smaller toggle-style controls, and clearer onboarding labels so the hosted app matches the current product direction.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: The synced beta build keeps the same public privacy and support routes and stays inside productivity-support language without adding new legal claims.
evidence: The hosted bundle still exposes legal/privacy and support flows.
No new medical, diagnostic, or treatment claims were added in the refreshed app build.

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: The refreshed build still supports a local-only session path through Tinfoil Hat and local sorting fallback when cloud assist is unavailable.
evidence: Brain dump now falls back to local sorting when assist is blocked or unavailable.
Tinfoil Hat copy remains present and still blocks cloud assist behavior.

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: The update changes wording, interaction design, and sorting behavior only; it does not introduce medical claims or therapeutic promises.
evidence: Sidekick prompt layers keep the existing non-medical boundary language.
Onboarding and planner copy remain framed as productivity support.

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: The brain dump update lowers cognitive load by allowing raw capture before sorting, and the sidekick changes make prompts more actionable without increasing pressure.
evidence: Brain dump now starts with type-or-talk capture and then sorts into now, later, and notes.
Takota and the other sidekicks now use clearer behavioral overlays with one-next-step constraints.

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: The refresh better matches neurodivergent-friendly workflows by reducing translation work, supporting voice capture, and preserving adjustable support pacing.
evidence: Brain dump now accepts spoken or typed messy input before cleanup.
Support-level logic and sidekick fallback behavior were preserved while voice layers were sharpened.

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users get a clearer capture tool and more distinct sidekick behavior, with lower risk of confusion from stale onboarding labels or oversized state controls.
evidence: Onboarding now uses step-specific labels instead of a generic onboarding badge.
Top-level state controls were converted to smaller toggle-style controls.

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: The refresh keeps the current brand look while making the sidekick voice more human, more specific, and less generic.
evidence: Sidekicks now have explicit prompt overlays and starter prompts.
Takota local fallback copy was sharpened to better match the intended dry, smart voice.

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: The new brain dump flow adds a clearer primary action, preserves typed input, and keeps the interface usable even when speech recognition is unavailable.
evidence: The capture flow keeps a large text area as the primary path.
Voice capture is additive, not required, and typed sorting remains available.

security_and_reliability.rationale: The synced build was rebuilt from source, local sorter behavior is covered by tests, and the hosted beta bundle was regenerated directly from the app repository.
evidence: npm run build passed for the current app state.
npm test passed for the current app state, including the new brain dump sorter test.
scripts/build_app_into_site.sh rebuilt and copied the current app dist into hub/beta.

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: This refresh does not add any payment, subscription, or manipulative engagement mechanics.
evidence: No monetization surface changed in the synced beta build.
The update focused on clarity, capture flow, and persona consistency only.

ship_decision.conditions: Ready to commit and push for the website beta sync. Real-device microphone behavior should still be verified on Android before store submission.
